description: You enter the Dusty Library. Floor-to-ceiling bookshelves are packed with ancient spellbooks. A door leads East.
You discover the Golden Treasury! Shimmering coins and glowing gems pile high. An archway leads West.
You enter the Dusty Library. Floor-to-ceiling bookshelves are packed with ancient spellbooks. A door leads East.
You stand in the Grand Lobby. Tall marble pillars support a vaulted ceiling. Arches lead North, South, and East.
You step into the Royal Garden. Exotic flowers bloom under the sunshine. A path leads back West.
You stand in the Grand Lobby. Tall marble pillars support a vaulted ceiling. Arches lead North, South, and East.
You creep into the Cold Dungeon. Chains hang from stone walls, and it smells damp. An exit goes North.
